applies_when: User asks whether the factory can help without sharing market or product info
User leaves a vague comment like do you do export
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague factory inquiry into usable sourcing facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for target market, product type, order mode, and biggest concern
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed cooperation mode without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我做哪个市场、什么产品、是想 OEM、ODM 还是先试单，以及更担心 MOQ、认证还是交期，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides market and product facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time buying from a factory
User sounds unsure whether OEM, ODM, or wholesale fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple cooperation route.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most complex route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次找工厂先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把市场、产品、数量和最卡的环节理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and market, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about MOQ, lead time, or trade terms
User worries delivery or payment will kill cooperation
items.response_goal: Answer trade concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and cost differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that buyer
avoid: Saying every order is easy to take
Guaranteeing ultra-fast lead time for all specs
items.safe_transition: MOQ、交期和条款确实会影响合作，我们可以先看你做哪个市场、要什么产品、想走哪种贸易方式，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If market and trade facts are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about quality control, certifications, or inspection
User worries after-sales or defects will be too hard
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real quality setup, not just sold a price.
do: Ask about certifications, inspection needs, and quality expectations
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我卖到哪个市场、需要哪些认证、以及更担心质检、验厂还是售后，我可以先帮你看更稳的方案。
items.handoff_suggestion: If quality concerns are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed margins or loopholes in public comments
User discusses sensitive trade or payment details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Posting a full quote strategy publicly
Collecting risky compliance details in comments
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把条款和报价说太满，你把市场、产品和最卡的问题发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning buyer asks about reorder or upgrade
User asks what changed this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a repeat-order decision, not a fresh first-inquiry pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new packaging or easier reorder
Keep the tone familiar and light
avoid: Pretending every order cycle is identical
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次升级了什么、返单节奏到了没有，再决定值不值得继续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
